feat: initial commit of clawed-code (Rust port of Claude Code v2.1.88)

A high-performance Rust implementation of Claude Code terminal AI assistant.

## Crates
- claude-core: config, messages, tool types, sessions, permissions
- claude-api: API client, streaming, multi-provider support
- claude-tools: 40+ built-in tools (file, shell, web, MCP, etc.)
- claude-agent: reasoning engine, hooks, coordinator, dispatch agent
- claude-computer-use: desktop automation (screenshot/mouse/keyboard)
- claude-mcp: Model Context Protocol client/server
- claude-swarm: multi-agent swarm (kameo actors)
- claude-cli: CLI entry, REPL, input system, rendering

## Features
- 8 API providers: Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama, DashScope, Bedrock, Vertex
- 57 slash commands with Tab completion
- Computer Use desktop automation
- Multi-agent coordinator mode
- MCP tool extension
- Hooks system (PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop)
- Skills system
- Session management with history

fix: strip /dev/null redirects to prevent false positives in hook

Added 4 false-positive test cases for /dev/null patterns.
Total tests: 55/55 passing.

commit.message:
refactor: extract descent loop into named phase functions

Main loop is now 10 lines calling named phases:
  runImplementorPhase() → runEvaluatorPhase() → runEscalation() → runTerminatorPhase()

Extracted 6 functions from the 465-line monolith:
- resumeOrInitState() — resume/init logic
- runImplementorPhase() — research + plan + exec with error checks
- runEvaluatorPhase() — evaluate + git commit/revert + record
- runEscalation() — campaigns + radical plan
- runTerminatorPhase() — rule check + agentic terminator
- handleIterationError() — revert + error report

All share a LoopContext struct. No behavior changes.
